title: sorghum affine
intro: Sorghum affine, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of flowering plant native to Africa and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Sorghum affine include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Sorghum affine can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
